raw_consumer_statement: This is a new, separate complaint regarding consumer intimidation, bad-faith investigation practices, and direct retaliation by Citibank corporate following my previous active complaint ( Case Number : XXXX ) .On XX/XX/year>, I received an unexpected, adversarial phone call from a Citibank Corporate Executive Response representative XXXX Instead of resolving the ongoing {$59.00} fraud dispute professionally through written regulatory channels, this representative used hostile, high-pressure interrogation tactics. I stated clearly and repeatedly that the charge from XXXX ' was completely unauthorized fraud and that my physical card was never lost. The representative ignored my statements and repeatedly attempted to bait, pressure, and gaslight me into admitting the charge was mine by claiming I was simply 'confused. ' The representative was intentionally trying to trap me into a false verbal admission to undermine my federal consumer protections under the Fair Credit Billing Act. Because of this abusive and manipulative phone behavior, I had to state 'Good day ' and terminate the call. This aggressive overreach is a direct retaliation tactic meant to intimidate me into dropping my regulatory rights.
